_comment: openclaw-health-audit config template. Copy to config.json and adjust, or run: python3 scripts/audit_wizard.py

prompt_files._comment: Workspace prompt files to monitor for size drift. Paths relative to ~/.openclaw/workspace/

subagent_soul._comment: Threshold for each subagent SOUL.md under ~/.openclaw/agents/*/workspace/SOUL.md

subagents._comment: List of subagent IDs to scan. Adjust to match your installed agents.

token_thresholds._comment: Daily token consumption thresholds (requires openclaw gateway usage-cost --json)

expensive_models._comment: Substrings to match model names considered expensive in cron jobs

checks._comment: Enable or disable each check category

cache_config._comment: Category E: Only relevant if you use semantic-router v7.x with M1/M3 patches
